summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date (latest date only for each APU)

transformations: Join rotables table with rotables_trend table on psn field
Join result with aircraft table on ac_registr field to filter by aircraft type
For each APU (identified by serialno), select only the row with the maximum ref_date (latest date only)
acceptance_criteria: Query returns APU part numbers, serial numbers, and PSN identifiers for all APUs fitted to B737NG aircraft
Only the latest reference date is included for each APU
CT5ATP values are correctly populated from rotables_trend.value
Workorder information is included when present in event_perfno_i
Query executes against AMOS Acceptance database and will be switched to AMOS Production upon go-live
VDS is created in Engine Folder as specified
